payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped white ceramic sink rim and shallow basin with a glossy finish, faint beige discoloration and a small dark drain/fixture visible near the center-top of the crop; slightly blurred and photographed at approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
